item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
plan='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06/migration/plan.json'
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read \""'$plan" --session scenario-06-numeric-fields --meta >/dev/null
jq -r '"'([\"batch_size\",(.batch_size|type),(.batch_size|tostring)]|@tsv), ([\"rollback_error_rate\",(.rollback_error_rate|type),(.rollback_error_rate|tostring)]|@tsv)' \""'$plan"
jq -e '"'(.batch_size|type)==\"number\" and (.batch_size % 1)==0 and .batch_size==25 and (.rollback_error_rate|type)==\"number\" and .rollback_error_rate==0.02' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
printf '"'batch_size_integral=PASS\\n'
printf 'PARSED_NUMERIC_CHECK=PASS\\n'"
